lines.speaker: Khazard Barman
lines.text: Hi, what can I get you? We have a range of quality brews.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I don't have enough room for one.

lines.speaker: Khazard Barman
lines.text: Not really, but if you want to see some action, keep an eye on the arena. I've seen some grand battles in my time. Ogres, goblins and even dragons have fought there.

lines.speaker: Khazard Barman
lines.text: Now, can I get you something?
